executive_summary.content: Acme Corp is a B2B SaaS company founded in 2018 with $12M ARR and 150 employees.
The company operates in the enterprise workflow automation market with 3-year CAGR of 42%.

financial_health.content: FY2023 revenue was $12.1M, up 38% YoY, with gross margin of 74%.
Cash burn rate is $420K/month with 18 months of runway at current burn.

legal_flags.content: No outstanding litigation as of Q4 2023 per counsel sign-off letter dated 2024-01-15.
IP is fully owned by the company; no third-party licensing encumbrances noted.

commercial_assessment.content: Top 5 customers represent 41% of ARR; churn rate is 4.2% annually.
NPS score of 62 places the product in the top quartile of B2B SaaS benchmarks.

red_flags.content: Two enterprise contracts (18% of ARR) are up for renewal in Q2 2024 with no signed LOIs.
Founder dependency risk: CEO and CTO together hold all ML IP knowledge.

key_questions.content: Clarify the revenue recognition policy for multi-year contracts — unclear if upfront or ratable.
Obtain signed renewal LOIs for the two contracts representing 18% of ARR before close.
